title: Pilot and Co-pilot saw a high speed UFO in front of their aircraft near Manaus [2010]
excerpt: NOV 13th, 2010. Time: 05:20 am. Duration: approximately 5 minutes. A pilot and co-pilot of flight GLO 1131, between Boa Vista, State of Roraima and Manaus, State of Amazonas, spotted an unidentified flying object when they were 75 nautical miles from Manaus and at approximately 23,000ft of altitude. text_preview: NOV 13th, 2010. Time: 05:20 am. Duration: approximately 5 minutes. A pilot and co-pilot of flight GLO 1131, between Boa Vista, State of Roraima and Manaus, State of Amazonas, spotted an unidentified flying object when they were 75 nautical miles from Manaus and at approximately 23,000ft of altitude. According to the witnesses’ report, the UFO consisted of a very strong light that traveled at high speed, making maneuvers above and in front of its aircraft, and heading towards the Southwest direction. The following are additional comments from the COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] r
summary: GOL 1131 pilot and co-pilot on Boa Vista–Manaus route spotted a very strong light performing high-speed maneuvers above and ahead of their aircraft at FL230–370.
